_note: Manual overrides for specific videos. Auto-detection used for all others.

Highground._note: Overhead camera. Horizontal lines cut across road lanes at midframe.

Intersection._note: Intersection camera. Vertical lines cut across the main approach lanes. Adjust x positions if the main road runs differently in the actual frame.

Sideway._note: Sideways street camera. Vertical tripwire at frame center. Adjust x (0.5) left/right if road is not centered in frame.
